channel.title: LLM Timeline — Xiaomi Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Xiaomi.

item.title: MiMo-V2-Flash (Xiaomi)
item.description: Parameters: MiMo-V2-Flash License: open Type: model 309BA15B.

item.title: MiMo-7B-RL-0530 (Xiaomi)
item.description: Parameters: MiMo-7B-RL-0530 License: open Type: model "[2025.05.30] During the RL training, by continuously expanding the training window size (from 32K to 48K), the performance of MiMo-7B-RL-0530 on AIME24 can be continuously improved and eventually surpass that of DeepSeek R1... MiMo-7B-Base is pre-trained on approximately 25 trillion tokens."
